meaning: n.选择,抉择,精选品,选择机会,选择权adj.精选的,上等的,挑三拣四的,可选的,宠爱的,爱惜的
examples: I wouldn't go there by choice.
There wasn't much choice of colour.
The Honda CRV comes with one engine choice, four trim levels and eight colors.
Vancouver beer drinkers used to have a "choice" between mass-produced Labatt and Molson brews.
